Slot: HEAD
AC: 10
STR: +6 CHA: +3
WT: 5.0 Size: SMALL
Class: WAR CLR PAL RNG SHD BRD ROG BER
Race: ALL except IKS
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)
Slot 2, Type 21 (Special Ornamentation)

Slot: HEAD
AC: 10
STR: +6 CHA: +3
WT: 5.0 Size: SMALL
Class: WAR CLR PAL RNG SHD BRD ROG BER

Drops

This item is found on creatures.

Castle Mistmoore
NPC Name
an avenging caitiff


Zone(s) Found In:


Zone Name
Castle Mistmoore


Uploaded January 11th, 2023 by iventheassassin
Send a correction
Post Comment
2014
QuoteReply
# Jan 25 2014 at 6:39 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1625444417008
Scholar
343 posts
dropped of the named roamer at back of Gy and secret door up to stairs, we were here 7 or 8 times over a few weeks, he spawned about 5 times out of about 20 PH. my Classic Paladin got te helm 1 time, and the shoulders 1 time, lovely jubbly
▲ Page top
lucky
QuoteReply
# Jun 26 2002 at 4:42 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592254692250
Scholar
40 posts
I had been hunting around the jail for sometime with the best loot being mere plat or fine steel weapons. After awhile, I camped, then decided late tonight to get back on and do some more hunting, since I couldn't sleep.

First thing I see in the jail room by the stair is this odd fellow in full plate called an Avenging Caitiff.

I pulled him and killed him with the usual nuke and duke and --viola!-- I'm looting a crested helm.

Very nice surprise.

I love it! The stats are better than the lumberjack cap I had and it looks great with my armor.

In fact, I look downright scary ... like a Teir'Dal priestess should. *grins evilly*

Opaque Sanctus
41 Cleric of Innoruuk
▲ Page top
.
QuoteReply
# Jun 24 2002 at 2:00 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592250767294
7 posts
Does anyone know what level an SK and Shaman go go into Mistmoore and get one of these? or the spaulders too? Im currently level 36 but Will be probably 38 before I think about going there
▲ Page top
i'll keep
QuoteReply
# Jun 21 2002 at 10:28 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591776948404
11 posts
i got this for 250pp on Ayonae Ro server quite a few levels back...think i was below 20 or something. i don't plan on getting rid of it simply because it's the best graphic i have seen so far in the way of ranger helms. dunno about stats tho....

are there any other ranger helms that have similar/cool looking graphic?

Looted of Avenging Caitiff
QuoteReply
# Oct 19 2001 at 12:57 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592249946762
2 posts
Killed this guy on the stairs up to the Jail,
He was blue at 35 and wasn't to hard at all.
Supposedly a rare drop but this was the 1st time I had seen him. Might have just been lucky..
So I gave it to my rogue who looks quite good in it. Doesn't look like the graphics though. Has two pointy horns coming off each side like some Vikings helmet.. Nifty Anyway
Nerind (paladin)
Uanua (druid)
Magdana (rogue)
▲ Page top

Oogobash Ubersmash 35 warrior
▲ Page top
RE: Limited Use
QuoteReply
# Feb 04 2002 at 1:55 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591758106980
222 posts
Mixed emotion - the STR is rather appealing and the CHR sure doesn't hurt, but for the plat (assuming SSB cost is correct) as well as the hitpoints and saving throw, the SSB is definately better.
▲ Page top
RE: Limited Use
QuoteReply
# Nov 10 2001 at 11:01 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593361362157
Scholar
21 posts
I have a crested helm and a crown of the holy defender, and the ssb is much better than both. I'll trade the crested helm for an ssb on sullon, in fact.

# Sep 11 2001 at 8:21 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591765535609
4 posts
I think this is better then SSB any day for any class. Anyway, this is good for rangers because it is one of the few Full Plate looking Helms that rangers can wear. I bought this in mind of starting a shammie, but shammies cant use! So, Im gonna get full ringmail/banded and start a Ranger.

Anyway Cya all and G'Luck

Zekil Firefist Iksar Monk of the 21st Circle
Folco Boffin Halfling Rogue of the 20th Ankle Stab
Realmar Wood Elf Ranger of the 2nd leaf!

# Jul 21 2001 at 11:09 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591762642284
40 posts
Youz see, de problem heer iz dat two compleetely seprut fillosofeez are at werk. One sez dat 'Armuh iz de King - evryfing else iz rubbish', an de uther sez 'Strenf iz best - bash yur enemies ter deth befaw dey can hurt youz!' If youza followa ov de furst way ov finkin, den dis helm iz no gud. If like meez, howevva, youz beleev in Strenf above all els, den dis helmet iz far, far sooperyuh to a SSB or RyGorr Chain, or wotevva... An well werf payin 400 pp for! :)
▲ Page top
Better than Skull - shaped Barbute?
QuoteReply
# May 13 2001 at 1:58 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
Is this item better than a skull shaped barbute(Im wearin it now) Its 13 AC +10 SVM and +35 HP i think...
▲ Page top
RE: Better than Skull - shaped Barbute?
QuoteReply
# Jun 08 2001 at 6:46 AM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
Well, I would not switch my skull shaped barbute for this as a warrior, since AC is more important than STR in my opinion. Plus 35 HP and 10 SV magic are also good warrior stats. I see the warrior main task to be to absorb damage, and AC, HP and SV magic will all do that. Just my thoughts...

▲ Page top
RE: Better than Skull - shaped Barbute?
QuoteReply
# May 19 2001 at 10:23 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
Hmmm, well out of all the times i zoned with 35 hp or less i would still say yes. i would give up 3 ac and 35 hp for 6 str any day... but you lose 10 sv M so i think its up to the person and the armor they have.

Clemm Smitson
40 warrior
